Annotation

Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us
The results indicate poor glycemic control (elevated HbA1c), hypoglycemia (low glucose), and significant dyslipidemia (high total and LDL cholesterol, low HDL cholesterol). Renal and electrolyte parameters are within normal limits. Recommend review of diabetes and lipid management, as well as assessment for cardiovascular risk and possible causes of hypoglycemia.
